en-US.name: Paint Weather: Exterior Timing
en-US.subtitle: Dew Point & Dry Time for Coats
en-US.promotional_text: Painting your home exterior? Paint Weather reads the forecast against your paint's own limits and tells you if today is a PAINT, WAIT, or DON'T day.
en-US.description:
Should you paint your exterior today? Paint Weather turns the local forecast and your paint's own limits into one clear answer - PAINT, WAIT, or DON'T - so a coat doesn't fail because it went on in the wrong conditions.

Air temperature looks fine, but a dark wall in the sun can be far hotter, the surface can sit too close to the dew point, or tonight's low can drop below what the paint needs while it sets. The rules are real but hard to track by hand, and they change hour by hour and wall by wall.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Set up your project: your paint type, siding material, paint color, and wall directions.
2. Paint Weather pulls the live forecast for your location and estimates each surface's temperature.
3. You get a single verdict - PAINT, WAIT, or DON'T - with the reason and the best time window today.

It takes 20 seconds to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Verdict
One answer plus the why - estimated surface temperature, dew point margin, temperature range, and rain for the next 24 hours, read at a glance instead of buried in charts.

Surface, Not Just Air
Estimates how hot or cold each wall really is from sun exposure, color, and material - not just the air temperature on your phone.

Product Aware
Pick a standard, low-temperature, or oil-based paint and the verdict uses that product's own temperature and recoat limits.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Per-face timing for north, east, south, and west walls
- Hourly paintable window and the latest time to stop today
- 48-hour check on whether overnight lows let the coat set
- 7-day application-window forecast
- Custom paint profiles with your own limits
- Multiple saved projects and condition-change alerts

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch the forecast for your area, never stored on any server
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Paint Weather is an informational planning tool based on public forecast data and general coating guidelines. It is not a substitute for your paint product's own instructions or experienced guidance. Always confirm conditions on site.
